overview: DevVault is a code snippet manager where developers can save, organize, search, and copy code snippets with language tagging, tags, dark/light mode, and a clean card-based UI.
features: Add code snippets with title, language, tags, and code content
Live search and filter across all snippet fields
Clean card-based UI with snippet preview
Modal popup for adding new snippets
Dark/Light mode toggle with localStorage persistence
Responsive layout for mobile, tablet, and desktop
